programs.title: Below Deck Down Under
programs.sub_title: Head of the Deck; Stew Department
programs.desc: Chef Ben and Jenna try to take their flirtations to the next level, but Eddy's jealousy and Mike's interference get in the way. After Mike crosses a line with Daisy, tensions explode across the boat. Crew gossip sparks a room swap.

programs.title: The Real Housewives of Rhode Island
programs.desc: Follow a tight-knit circle of Rhode Islanders who have families that go back generations; these decade-long friendships prove that in a state this small, there's no escaping your past, or each other.

programs.title: Top Chef
programs.desc: A hit reality competition series that celebrates the culinary arts with a window into the competitive, pressurized environment of world-class cookery.

programs.title: Summer House
programs.desc: West and Ciara test their new friendship; a new trio of bed bugs uncover information about some fellow housemates; Carl opens the doors to Soft Bar for friends and family with some not-so-friendly encounters.

programs.title: The Valley
programs.desc: Janet's game night olive branch yields mixed results; Jesse gives Lacy a divorce update in hopes of taking things to the next level; Kristen and Luke continue to struggle with their communication.

programs.title: The Kelly Clarkson Show
programs.desc: Kellyoke encore: "The Middle"; Andy Serkis; Laufey; The Chick Mission; Philly Goat Project; Girli performs; guest hosts Tara Lipinski and Johnny Weir.
